messages.content: # Here is how to fix *Race Cancelled*

# SOMEONE MAY HAVE TAKEN YOUR CAR. PRESS REFRESH TO SEE WHAT CARS ARE AVAILABLE

# Method 1
> - Make sure Steam is opened and logged in.
> - Make sure the right Steam Account is connected to Content Manager.<#1322220240167239750> 
> - If it crashes while loading a car, reinstall the car <#1440122305861652520> 
> - If it crashes while loading the map, reinstall the map <#1457475437809631416> 

# Method 2
-# Only if the above fix does not work
> Follow <#1440122305861652520>

# Method 3
-# Only if the above fix does not work.
## Step 1
> Right click on the `start button` and select `system`.

## Step 2
> On your right in `related settings`, click on `Advanced system settings`

## Step 3
> In the `advanced` tab, under `performance` click on `settings`.

## Step 4
> In the `Advanced` tab under `virtual memory`, select `change`
> Untick the case `Automatically manage paging file size`
> Select your faster drive with at least 16gb of free space
> Select `Custom size` and write `16000` in `initial size` and `maximum size` and don't forget to click on `Set`

## Step 5
> Select `Ok` and restart your PC

# Method 4
-# Only if the above fix did not work.
## Step 1
> Make sure your Contentmanager.exe is not installed in either one of your program files folder. 
## Step 2
> If it is just make a separate folder somewhere else and drag and drop the launcher to the new folder you've made

## Method 5
-# Only if the above fix did not work
> <#1322234984181796934> > Reinstall the game on steam
